evals.prompt: Update my ignore files — I added result/ and .direnv/ to my .gitignore manually but forgot .codeiumignore
evals.expected_output: Runs reconcile to find result/ and .direnv/ as orphans, suggests build-artifacts and dev-local, then generates all outputs
Runs generate --output .gitignore, preserving any existing project-specific content above the marker

evals.prompt: What ignore files am I missing?
evals.expected_output: Runs audit and reports which outputs are missing or stale

evals.prompt: Update all my code-workspace files with proper exclude settings
evals.expected_output: Runs workspace mode to find *.code-workspace files and auto-merge files.exclude, search.exclude, files.watcherExclude

evals.prompt: My ripgrep search results are full of lockfiles and binary files, fix that
evals.expected_output: Runs ripgrep mode to update ~/.config/ripgrep/ripgrepignore with lockfiles, binaries, and other noise patterns
